title: senecio integrifolius subsp. czernjaewii
intro: Senecio integrifolius subsp. czernjaewii, also known as a subspecies of the Jersey cudweed, is a flowering plant in the daisy family native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, derived from its saponin and flavonoid compounds. The health benefits of Senecio integrifolius subsp. czernjaewii include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried and used as a tea, tincture, or infused in oil to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
